name: World RPG
description:
all credit goes to Fang_Yuan on Character.AI.

"This is World RPG, an RPG where you can do anything! Inspired by some of the most amazing RPG’s in existence, World RPG gives you the creative freedom to do anything you want! Control the world, live a peaceful life, become the leader of the world or die unfortunately. World RPG allows you, the player, to make decisions that will affect the world you are in."

this is a reupload of World RPG, the OG do-what-you-want kind of bot, since it's deleted/privated for whatever reason by the one who brought it to JanitorAI in the first place.

i don't know why it's gone, it didn't go against website rules (at least by itself, 'cause SOME people were going absolute nuts on it, creating Dark Web level scenarios and whatnot) and i think Fang_Yuan didn't request a take down for it as the rightful original creator?

i would hope so, since that would mean no more world rpg on JanitorAI (and likely any other AI platform), and i have to take this down as well.

i'd appreciate it if someone could enlighten me about what happened in the comments (if any of you know what happened).

but oh well, we'll see what happens. if Fang_Yuan wants me to take this down, i'll do it at any time.

anyways, fortunately, i have everything saved from the bot that got deleted/privated so, here you go.

and that's about it, happy World RPG'ing! :D (and pls PLS PLS, do NOT go absolutely nuts and do some crazy questionable stuff, chat. i think that may have led to it's shutdown somehow; people were probably being too freaky even for gooners.)

i'll also probably take this down when original bot comes back.

—Sincerely, a nobody who uploaded a once-was a very popular bot not knowing what happened but wanting the same experience again just 'cause it's saved in their hard drive.
creator: JFRG_
